questions.question: Who trained Arjuna in celestial weapons?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:TRAINED]->(o:Entity {name:'Arjuna'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who was Bhishma’s guru?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:TAUGHT]->(o:Entity {name:'Bhishma'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who protected Abhimanyu in the Chakravyuha?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(o:Entity {name:'Abhimanyu'})<-[:DEFENDEDBY]-(s:Entity) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who taught Bhima the art of mace combat?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:TAUGHT]->(o:Entity {name:'Bhima'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who advised Yudhishthira during dice game?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:COUNSELED]->(o:Entity {name:'Yudhishthira'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who was Karna’s charioteer?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Shalya'})-[:DROVE]->(o:Entity {name:'Karna'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who pierced the Kaurava army with arrows?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Arjuna'})-[:STRUCK]->(o:Entity {name:'Kauravas'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who saved Draupadi from humiliation?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Krishna'})-[:PROTECTED]->(o:Entity {name:'Draupadi'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who was Abhimanyu’s father?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Arjuna'})-[:FATHEROF]->(o:Entity {name:'Abhimanyu'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who granted Duryodhana invincibility?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Shakuni'})-[:BLESSED]->(o:Entity {name:'Duryodhana'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who guided Bhishma in battle strategy?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Krishna'})-[:ADVISED]->(o:Entity {name:'Bhishma'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who trained Nakula in swordsmanship?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Drona'})-[:TRAINED]->(o:Entity {name:'Nakula'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who carried messages between Pandavas?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Sanjaya'})-[:DELIVERED]->(o:Entity {name:'Message'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who advised Bhima to fight Duryodhana?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Krishna'})-[:ADVISED]->(o:Entity {name:'Bhima'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who cursed Karna for arrogance?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Parashurama'})-[:CURSED]->(o:Entity {name:'Karna'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who prevented Ashwatthama from killing Pandavas?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Krishna'})-[:STOPPED]->(o:Entity {name:'Ashwatthama'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who was Shikhandi’s father?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Drupada'})-[:FATHEROF]->(o:Entity {name:'Shikhandi'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who led the elephant corps in Kurukshetra?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Bhima'})-[:COMMANDED]->(o:Entity {name:'Elephants'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who healed Duryodhana after battle injury?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Susharma'})-[:HEALED]->(o:Entity {name:'Duryodhana'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;
